[[BLOCK:slide8_shape1]]
Smith (2018): "Many big data researchers believe that the greater the number of potential explanatory variables, the more useful Stepwise Regression (逐步回归 (Stepwise Regression)) becomes in selecting explanatory variables. In reality, the greater the number of potential explanatory variables, the worse the performance of Stepwise Regression. Stepwise Regression does not address the issue of excessive explanatory variables in big data. On the contrary, big data exacerbates the shortcomings of Stepwise Regression."  
https://doi.org/10.1186/s40537-018-0143-6
